## Description
[REQUIREMENT-ID] Provide a brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] ui: Styling/Layout
- [ ] chore: Config/Deps

- [ ] No lint errors

- [ ] Loading/Error states handled
- [ ] Manual testing passed
